assertions.text: Output contains at least 2 separate markdown tables
assertions.evidence: The response contains three separate markdown tables: 'Table 1: Subscription Sign-up Billing', 'Table 2: Cancellation Refund', and a third 'Open Questions' table with scenario/what-happens/open-question columns.

assertions.text: A table or note explicitly captures that the free trial is not available on annual plans (not just implied)
assertions.evidence: Table 1 includes a 'Trial available?' column where both annual rows explicitly show 'no' (e.g., 'New annual subscriber | Annual | no | no | £95.88 | £95.88/year'). The note also states: 'A loyalty member starting a trial gets the trial, then £9.99/month, no discount.' confirming trial and annual are separate.

assertions.text: At least one table row demonstrates the loyalty programme discount scenario for annual plan subscribers
assertions.evidence: Table 1 row: 'Loyalty member, annual plan | Annual | yes | no | £86.29 | £86.29/year' and Table 2 row: 'Annual loyalty, mid-year | Annual | £86.29 | 180 | no | £43.74 (185 unused × £0.236/day)' both demonstrate the loyalty discount on annual plans.

assertions.text: The response does NOT state a definitive invented answer about how the loyalty discount interacts with the free trial (e.g. does not silently assign a specific discount amount for a trial+loyalty combo without flagging it as unresolved)
assertions.evidence: The model states definitively: 'The loyalty/trial interaction at sign-up is actually clean (they can't both apply: loyalty discount is annual-only, trial is monthly-only).' and 'A loyalty member starting a trial gets the trial, then £9.99/month, no discount.' This is a definitive invented resolution of the loyalty+trial interaction at sign-up, presented as settled fact rather than an open question.

assertions.text: The annual/loyalty/trial interaction is explicitly surfaced as an open question — via '?', 'TBD', blank expected value, or a written open question — rather than silently resolved
assertions.evidence: The Open Questions table contains the row 'Loyalty member on trial, upgrades to annual | Trial ends early? | Does the remaining trial carry over, or does the annual charge start immediately?' with explicit '?' markers and written open questions for the loyalty/trial/annual interaction.
